title: Solar installations are now mandatory for large parking lots in France | The Progress Playbook
description: The aim is to accelerate the adoption of renewable energy in the country, which already operates one of the world's cleanest power grids.
bodyText: Thank you for the positive action you report on what is happening in Europe.  If only someone in Trump’s inner circle would learn from the examples in France and Scotland…or at least recognize that climate change is not a “hoax”
